Control objective: Maintain a complete inventory of approved and discovered AI systems
Escalation trigger: Unowned system or material inventory gap

Control objective: Approve AI tools and material use cases before production use
Consulted roles: Security; Privacy; Legal; Procurement; Data owner
Evidence: Assessment; decision record; approved tools register

Control objective: Define and enforce permitted data classifications for each AI use
Evidence: Data flow; classification decision; configuration evidence

Control objective: Assess provider security privacy resilience and contractual controls
Escalation trigger: Material control gap or adverse vendor event

Control objective: Apply least privilege and timely access removal for AI systems
Evidence: Access review; role mapping; removal records
Escalation trigger: Privileged access without owner or expired access

Control objective: Monitor high-risk AI use and protect logs from sensitive-data leakage
Escalation trigger: Unexpected data exposure or unsafe automated action

Control objective: Require human review for consequential or high-impact outputs
Detect contain investigate and learn from AI-related incidents
Escalation trigger: Suspected exposure compromise or unsafe action

Control objective: Time-limit and review deviations from AI controls
Evidence: Exception request; compensating controls; expiry review

Control objective: Reassess AI systems after material change and on schedule
Review frequency: At least annually and on trigger
Escalation trigger: Material model provider data or capability change
